tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Feel the sun on my skin tonight
Log drums rolling we feeling right
Amapiano got the whole place moving
Summer never ends when the groove is soothing

[Pre-Chorus]
Yiza yiza come closer now
The bass is calling show me how
We dance until the morning light
Amapiano summer night

[Chorus]
Summer groove, summer groove
We got nothing left to prove
Feel the rhythm feel the heat
Every heartbeat on the beat
Summer groove, summer groove
Let the piano make you move
Underneath the city stars
This is who we really are

[Verse 2]
Shaker rhythm and a deep bassline
Every moment feeling so divine
Johannesburg to the world we shine
This amapiano sound is mine

[Chorus]
Summer groove, summer groove
We got nothing left to prove
Feel the rhythm feel the heat
Every heartbeat on the beat
Summer groove, summer groove
Let the piano make you move
Underneath the city stars
This is who we really are

[Bridge]
Close your eyes and let it flow
Let the summer take control
Every soul in every crowd
Feeling free and feeling proud

[Outro]
Summer groove, summer groove
Amapiano summer groove

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Television static in my veins
Every channel plays the same refrain
They sold us futures made of glass
Broke the mold and burned the past

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't need your algorithm love
I don't need your curated drugs
Give me something real tonight
Give me noise and give me light

[Chorus]
Static hearts we're burning down the wire
Static hearts we set the stage on fire
We are the ones they tried to mute
Static hearts we are the absolute

[Verse 2]
Distortion through the bedroom wall
My generation heard the call
We're not your content we're the storm
Breaking every single norm

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't need your algorithm love
I don't need your curated drugs
Give me something real tonight
Give me noise and give me light

[Chorus]
Static hearts we're burning down the wire
Static hearts we set the stage on fire
We are the ones they tried to mute
Static hearts we are the absolute

[Bridge]
Turn it up until it bleeds
This is everything I need
Raw and loud and unrefined
This is music undefined

[Outro]
Static hearts, static hearts
We never stop, we never start
We just burn

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Alarm at five the city still asleep
Promises I made I plan to keep
No days off no time to hesitate
I'm building empires they can only spectate
Every setback is a setup for the rise
Hunger in my chest and fire in my eyes

[Pre-Chorus]
They told me stop
I told them watch
Every single second on the clock

[Chorus]
Empire state of mind on the grind
Every single day I'm leaving doubt behind
Empire state I'm stacking bricks of time
This hustle never sleeps and neither do I

[Verse 2]
Laptop open six tabs and a dream
Nothing handed everything is what it seems
Built the vision when they said it couldn't last
Now they're watching and the future's moving fast
Boardroom ready but the basement built the man
Started with a notebook and a master plan

[Chorus]
Empire state of mind on the grind
Every single day I'm leaving doubt behind
Empire state I'm stacking bricks of time
This hustle never sleeps and neither do I

[Bridge]
Four AM the world is mine
Every sacrifice a sign
Diamonds forged from pressure and from time

[Outro]
Empire state, empire state
The grind don't wait, the grind don't wait
